attributes.description: AWS ELB (Classic) dashboard. Pulls per-load-balancer metrics from `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` and falls back to `logs-*` (dataset filter aws.elb_logs) for recent access-log lines.
attributes.title: [AWS ELB] Nico WIP

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS ELB load balancers across your infrastructure in real time.
Filter by load balancer at the top. Spot elevated 5xx, backend errors, and unhealthy hosts in the summary table then click any load balancer to drill down, or jump to its access logs in Discover.
To get started, configure CloudWatch metric streams for your ELB load balancers with the Elastic agent.

embeddableConfig.title: AI Summary (ELB)

savedVis.title: AI Summary (ELB)
savedVis.description: AI Summary panel for the ELB dashboard. Static mock content.

embeddableConfig.description: AI Summary panel for the ELB dashboard. Static mock content.

embeddableConfig.title: Load Balancers
embeddableConfig.description: Per-LB summary table. Requests, latency, backend 5xx, healthy/unhealthy hosts, rejected connections.

attributes.title: Load Balancers
attributes.description: Per-LB summary table. Requests, latency, backend 5xx, healthy/unhealthy hosts, rejected connections.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS c_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),         c_err = COALESCE(SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0),         c_rejected_count = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)),         c_dur_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)),         c_dur_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)),         c_in_tok  = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),         c_out_tok = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)),         c_region  = MAX(cloud.region) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(     c_err > 0, 1,     c_rejected_count > 0, 2,     c_inv > 0, 3,     4),   c_state = CASE(     c_err > 0, "erroring",     c_rejected_count > 0, "rejecting-connections",     c_inv > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS c_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),         c_err = COALESCE(SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0),         c_rejected_count = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)),         c_dur_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)),         c_dur_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)),         c_in_tok  = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),         c_out_tok = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)),         c_region  = MAX(cloud.region) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(     c_err > 0, 1,     c_rejected_count > 0, 2,     c_inv > 0, 3,     4),   c_state = CASE(     c_err > 0, "erroring",     c_rejected_count > 0, "rejecting-connections",     c_inv > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Load balancers by health
embeddableConfig.description: Donut of load balancers grouped by overall health (healthy / degraded / unhealthy). Health derived from HealthyHostCount vs UnHealthyHostCount per LB.

attributes.title: Load balancers by health
attributes.description: Donut of load balancers grouped by overall health (healthy / degraded / unhealthy). Health derived from HealthyHostCount vs UnHealthyHostCount per LB.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))        BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(     be_5xx > 0, "erroring",     unhealthy > 0, "degraded",     healthy > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))        BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(     be_5xx > 0, "erroring",     unhealthy > 0, "degraded",     healthy > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

embeddableConfig.description: Total distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the selected time range (`COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)`).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS lbs = COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)
FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS lbs = COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)

attributes.description: Total distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the selected time range (`COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)`).

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with backend 5xx responses (`SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) > 0`) in the selected time range — same `lb_state` taxonomy as the `Load balancers by health` pie.

attributes.description: Load balancers with backend 5xx responses (`SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) > 0`) in the selected time range — same `lb_state` taxonomy as the `Load balancers by health` pie.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "erroring"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "erroring"

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with unhealthy hosts but no 5xx errors (`MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)) > 0`) — `lb_state == "degraded"` bucket of the pie.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "degraded"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "degraded"

attributes.description: Load balancers with unhealthy hosts but no 5xx errors (`MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)) > 0`) — `lb_state == "degraded"` bucket of the pie.

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers reporting metrics but no healthy / unhealthy hosts and no errors (`lb_state == "idle"` bucket of the pie). Expected for newly-provisioned or quiescent LBs.

attributes.description: Load balancers reporting metrics but no healthy / unhealthy hosts and no errors (`lb_state == "idle"` bucket of the pie). Expected for newly-provisioned or quiescent LBs.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "idle"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "idle"

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with healthy hosts and no errors or degraded targets (`lb_state == "healthy"` bucket of the pie).

attributes.description: Load balancers with healthy hosts and no errors or degraded targets (`lb_state == "healthy"` bucket of the pie).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "healthy"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "healthy"

embeddableConfig.title: Requests (+) / Backend errors (−) per 5 min
embeddableConfig.description: Stacked: positive = total RequestCount per 5 min; negative = target 5xx responses per 5 min.

attributes.title: Requests (+) / Backend errors (−) per 5 min
attributes.description: Stacked: positive = total RequestCount per 5 min; negative = target 5xx responses per 5 min.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0    AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),         errors = -1 * COALESCE(SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), LoadBalancer | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0    AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),         errors = -1 * COALESCE(SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), LoadBalancer | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: HTTP 4xx (+) / HTTP 5xx (−) per 5 min
embeddableConfig.description: Stacked: positive = HTTPCode_Target_4XX per 5 min; negative = HTTPCode_Target_5XX per 5 min.

attributes.title: HTTP 4xx (+) / HTTP 5xx (−) per 5 min
attributes.description: Stacked: positive = HTTPCode_Target_4XX per 5 min; negative = HTTPCode_Target_5XX per 5 min.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS client_errors = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count`, NULL)),         server_errors = -SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), LoadBalancer | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS client_errors = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count`, NULL)),         server_errors = -SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), LoadBalancer | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Active connections over time (avg)
embeddableConfig.description: Average EstimatedALBActiveConnectionCount per 5 min across all LBs. Use as the primary capacity signal — fluctuates with load.

attributes.title: Active connections over time (avg)
attributes.description: Average EstimatedALBActiveConnectionCount per 5 min across all LBs. Use as the primary capacity signal — fluctuates with load.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | EVAL ts = DATE_TRUNC(5 minutes, @timestamp) | STATS active_conn = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY ts | SORT ts ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | EVAL ts = DATE_TRUNC(5 minutes, @timestamp) | STATS active_conn = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY ts | SORT ts ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Avg latency (s)
embeddableConfig.description: Average backend Latency per 5 min across all LBs.

attributes.title: Avg latency (s)
attributes.description: Average backend Latency per 5 min across all LBs.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0    AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS metric = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), LoadBalancer | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0    AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS metric = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), LoadBalancer | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Rejected connections (max)
embeddableConfig.description: Maximum ApplicationELB RejectedConnectionCount per 5 min across all load balancers. Non-zero values indicate the load balancer rejected connection attempts.

attributes.title: Rejected connections (max)
attributes.description: Maximum ApplicationELB RejectedConnectionCount per 5 min across all load balancers. Non-zero values indicate the load balancer rejected connection attempts.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | EVAL ts = DATE_TRUNC(5 minutes, @timestamp) | STATS rejected_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)),         rejected_total = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY ts | SORT ts ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | EVAL ts = DATE_TRUNC(5 minutes, @timestamp) | STATS rejected_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)),         rejected_total = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY ts | SORT ts ASC

embeddableConfig.title: ELB access logs (with fallback)
embeddableConfig.description: Recent access log lines from `logs-*` filtered to dataset `aws.elb_logs`. Falls back to free-text COALESCE across common message fields.

attributes.title: ELB access logs (with fallback)
attributes.description: Recent access log lines from `logs-*` filtered to dataset `aws.elb_logs`. Falls back to free-text COALESCE across common message fields.

query.esql: FROM "logs-*" | WHERE data_stream.dataset == "aws.elb_logs" | KEEP @timestamp, message | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 200
FROM "logs-*" | WHERE data_stream.dataset == "aws.elb_logs" | KEEP @timestamp, message | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 200
